title: Proclamation No. 356, s. 1965
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 356

RESERVING FOR TENEMENT HOUSING PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE DISTRICT OF PASIL, CITY OF CEBU, ISLAND OF CEBU

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for tenement housing purposes, under the administration of the City of Cebu, subject to private rights, if any there be, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the District of Pasil, City of Cebu, Island of Cebu, and more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Pls-124 Proposed Site of Tenement Housing Project

“A parcel of land (Pls-124, the proposed site for Tenement Housing Project), situated in the City of Cebu. Bounded on the N., by M. de la Concepcion Street; on the E., by Guadalupe River; on the S., by Cebu Strait; and on the W., by Public Land and the proposed extension of Bugallon Street. Beginning at a point marked 1 on the attached sketch plan, being thence due North, 85.00 meters to point 2; thence due East, 190.00 meters to point 3; thence S. 82 deg. 30′ E., 145.00 meters to point 4; thence S. 25 deg. 18′ E., 73.08 meters to point 5; thence due West, 365.00 meters to the point of beginning; containing an approximate area of 28,041 square meters.

NOTE: All data are approximate and subject to change based on future surveys.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 7th day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-five.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: RAMON A. DIAZ Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
